Russetvane Systems is a seed-stage company. Founded by Freya Emberlyn. The seed conversation started in 2025.

Freya Emberlyn is the founder of Russetvane Systems. Freya is exploring a pivot toward the enterprise segment.

turns.text: Partner meeting wrapped on the Russetvane Systems round.
We decided to pass on the Russetvane Systems round. Pricing is too rich at this stage. Logging it now.
